lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: There's not much time left.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Maybe I'll... No, stupid idea Guss!

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: What am I going to do?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Hmm, I wonder... I could use a hand with something actually.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah? What exactly do you need help with?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: You're willing to help? Great stuff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't say y-

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: The name is Guss, Guss Mistletoad. You see that portal over there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see it.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: That's the portal to The Nutcracker pub. It's been a dream of mine to get inside.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I swear I didn't see that pub on my bar crawl card.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've never seen this portal or heard of this pub before.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you just walk in?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Poor innocent Player, you can't just do that! It's Santa's prized pub, only a select few can enter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what exactly are the criteria for entry?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: You have to win the Festive Games of course. It's a series of games to determine who is the most festive in the land.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're familiar with these games?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Yes! But I'm not good at them. I can never get past the final. That's where I'm hoping you can help! Let's rig it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: By 'rig the games' you mean I carry you through them?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Shall we begin?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, as long as you'll bring me some beer from the pub when you win.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: If there's any left after I'm done!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do we enter these games then?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: First off we need to nab ourselves some game times from Santa.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: You've got to do this Player, but be very vague as to why you need two entry times.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do I need to be vague?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: As I mentioned before, I've taken part in these games many times before. Failing every single time.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Let's say I'm not exactly on the nice list at the moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll do my best.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Thanks Player, I'm so excited for an all-I-can-drink beer-fest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me a bit about yourself, Guss.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: What a lovely person you are Player! I do love a backstory!

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Let's paint a picture for you...

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: It was a frosty morning in the month of Bennath, around twenty one years go...

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: I'd just left my friend Doric's house after 'borrowing' some ore to take back to the mines.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Off to work I go.. Hi ho, h-

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: No that's not right.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Anyway, I went to work and as you can probably tell, I work in the Dwarven Mines.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: One day I got really thirsty, I hadn't consumed an alcoholic beverage in over five minutes.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: I was getting reckless.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: So I went out in search of the nearest pub.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: For some unknown reason I saw this portal, same as you see it today.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: It's the middle of Bennath, why does it look so Christmassy? I thought to myself.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Turns out there'd been a mix up...

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Long story short, I got chatting to Santa and he told me about the games and the amazing Nutcracker pub.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: From that day on I was determined to gain access to this pub!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So in a nutshell, you got thirsty and wanted to go to a pub?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Yup.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know there is a pub just south-west of here? In Falador?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Oh, there's one finite detail I missed out.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: The Nutcracker has a FREE BAR!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course it has.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Some of the folk passing through felt a bit sorry for me after all these years, so they made me this cool jumper and hat to keep me warm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They do look great.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you've done these games before Guss?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: That's correct, yeah.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This will be easy then. You can just tell me how to win each game.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Annoyingly, the games change every year.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: But I can tell you what I know.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Santa runs these games like a tournament. You win one, you move onto the next game.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: There are two games total, and then the final!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What were the games like before? Were they hard?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: For a small dwarf like me, the hardest thing I've ever played.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: But for you it'll be a piece of cake!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I hope so.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I better be off.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Bye Player!

sections.title: After getting Guss his game time

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, I've got two times for us.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Amazing, Santa didn't suspect a thing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, but you may have to re-home a few kittens.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Uhhh, I'm not s-

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But that's not important right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, there is a bit of a snag. Our times are different for entering the games.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Oh no, this can't be happening. That puts a right spanner in the works.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, by the sounds of it you said it's a tournament format right?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: I did say that, yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So maybe everyone gets pulled in for one big final?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Of course! How silly of me, you'd have thought I would remember that after twenty one years of playing these games.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How confident are you in getting to the final?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Oh it's impossible for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Silly [player name], I'll cheat of course. I gave up my festive games morals long ago.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Suit yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks like my time is first, so I'll hopefully see you in the final!

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Good luck [player name] I've got snow doubts you'll do great!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did you just-

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Until we meet again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, this is the finale?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Yes indeed [player name].

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Amazing job getting here so far by the way. I had absolute faith in you!

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: This last game is a blood bath.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you know so much about the final game, you haven't even played it yet?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: I may or may not have played all these games before, and just not told you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you kidding me?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Nope. It might have put you off!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, how does this game work then?

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: The aim of the game is to eliminate all the other players.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Do you see those snowball piles scattered about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I think so.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Awesome, you'll want to stock up as many as you can. Then take no prisoners.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that yellow sn-

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Last player standing is the winner, it's simple really.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let you win... Hmm.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Let's do this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I want to have a look around first.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Be quick! I can already taste that sweet nectar of the gods.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: We really sh'mashed that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We did, but you did knock me out.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: I knew they you in let.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you okay Guss? We only finished moments ago.

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Abshofruitly...

lines.speaker: Barbarian bartender
lines.text: Your little dwarf friend knows this is all alcohol-free beer right [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh Guss...

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Air Guss heading your way!

lines.speaker: Guss Mistletoad
lines.text: Gosh I'm so good!
